expectedIssues: Casino icon design/layout is broken in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: Game cards on the right edge are clipped mid-image to indicate scrollability, which can look slightly untidy on certain screen widths.
The information icon ('i') on the bottom left of game tiles is very small and lacks sufficient contrast against some game backgrounds.

expected.reasoning: Neither reported issue describes the Casino icon in the bottom nav bar; they both concern game cards/tiles styling and layout issues.
